title: Sprint 4 Day 04 — Together AI dispatcher (zero-dep) + npm audit 13→4 + benchmark 5.31 + axe E2E spec
scope: Day 04 runtime delivery: S4.1.4 Together AI Batch dispatcher (native fetch, DRY-RUN default, zero-dep) + 19 unit tests + E2E wiki-smoke+axe spec + npm audit fix -9 high + benchmark write 4.75→5.31
mcp_calls_detail: mcp__plugin_claude-mem_mcp-search__smart_search query='together-ai-batch-dispatch' (output too large; redirected via file)
mcp__plugin_context7_context7__query-docs batch API surface (client.batches.create / files.upload / error codes 400/401/403/404/422/429/5xx confirmed)
artifacts: scripts/wiki-dispatch-batch.mjs (260 lines, zero-dep native fetch dispatcher DRY-RUN default)
tests/e2e/16-wiki-smoke-axe.spec.js (2 specs syntax validated; browser run deferred Day 26)
decisions_captured: Together AI integration uses native Node built-in fetch + FormData + Blob (no 'together-ai' npm install) — respects CLAUDE.md rule 13 'MAI aggiungere dipendenze senza approvazione'
DRY-RUN default (exit code 2) + --execute flag required for paid POST = safety guard against accidental paid dispatch

Cost estimator verified live: 117 records × 2048 max_tokens = 239616 output tokens + ~78913 input tokens = $0.14 USD total batch pricing (Llama 3.3 70B Instruct Turbo $0.44/1M tokens batch rate per ADR-005)
Error taxonomy matches Together TypeScript SDK exactly (400/401/403/404/422/429/5xx) — verified via context7 query-docs
npm audit fix non-breaking only: 13 high → 4 high (-9); residuals all in vite-plugin-pwa major chain (Andrea gate required for --force)
isDirectRun detection must use fileURLToPath (not new URL().pathname) for paths containing spaces (VOLUME 3 bug caught+fixed)
Benchmark previous_score in state file 4.79 drifts from actual benchmark.json 4.75 — reconcile Day 26 (GAP-DAY25-03)

honest_notes: Composite Harness 2.0 8.1/10 above 7.7 target, +0.5 vs Day 24 7.6 — functionality 8.0 maintained
MCP explicit calls 5 is partial recovery from Day 24 zero — still below ≥10 target
Ratchet +19 tests above +15/day floor — tight margin (only +4)
Native-fetch choice zero-dep was right call: axe-core alone added 13 high audits (post-fix 4); adding together-ai package would have grown indirect audit surface
$0.14 cost estimate is well under $1/day budget per ADR-005 research — Together Batch API economics as predicted
All Day 24 gaps addressed except GAP-DAY24-01 (lesson count, Andrea gate) and GAP-DAY24-03 (PTC container, Day 26+)
